modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by a help desk analyst during a live chat session and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in symptom-first manner and use an even and factual tone. The writing should have very limited detail and show limited technical understanding. There should be no spelling errors and some irrelevant details included.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Difficulty installing the Everbridge mobile app for campus alerts.

full_description_text: The user is trying to install the Everbridge mobile app related to the USD Campus Alert System. They are unsure about the installation process and have questions about the app itself. This has led to confusion during the live chat session with the help desk analyst.
short_description: Difficulty installing the Everbridge mobile app for campus alerts.
description: The user is trying to install the Everbridge mobile app related to the USD Campus Alert System. They are unsure about the installation process and have questions about the app itself. This has led to confusion during the live chat session with the help desk analyst.
